name: @uptimizr/playcanvas
description: PlayCanvas connector for Uptimizr — captures camera, pointer, mesh, and perf events as an sdk-core collector.
author: Raanan Weber (https://github.com/RaananW)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm run bundle && pnpm run bundle:global
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:playcanvas --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/playcanvas standalone bundle — Apache-2.0. Async-import into any page that already runs PlayCanvas; playcanvas stays external (peer dependency, never bundled). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-playcanvas.js
scripts.bundle:global: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=Uptimizr --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:playcanvas --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/playcanvas standalone bundle (global) — Apache-2.0. Inject via a <script> tag into a page that runs PlayCanvas; exposes window.Uptimizr. playcanvas stays external (peer dependency, never bundled). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-playcanvas.global.js
